hooks.command: powershell -Command "$date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; $content = \"# Sessão $date\nSessão encerrada. Executar /wrapup para consolidar aprendizados.\"; $path = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot '../memory/history'; if(!(Test-Path $path)){New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $path}; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $path \"$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd-HH')-sessao.md\") -Value $content"
